Container.Name: Plex DB Merge
Container.Overview: Merge data from a corrupt Plex database into an older good backup. Web UI to compare and merge watch history, settings, and optionally new library items. Uses bundled SQLite with .recover support.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Plex DB Merge web interface port.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path to folder containing your Plex DBs. On start, the container sets ownership to PUID:PGID so the app and your uploads can write. Set Start browse at to /data in the UI.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for /data ownership and running the app (Unraid default 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for /data ownership (Unraid default 100 = users).
